user.title: CozyLife Local
user.description: Enter a device IP address to add one device, or leave IP Address empty and submit to scan the local network. For battery temperature/humidity sensors that are asleep during setup, enter the IP address and enable Sleeping temp/humidity sensor.

select_device.title: CozyLife Local
select_device.description: {count} CozyLife device(s) found or already configured. Select one to add.

error.invalid_network: Enter a valid IPv4 network CIDR, such as 192.168.1.0/24, or use auto.
error.ip_required_for_sleeping_sensor: Enter an IP address when adding a sleeping temp/humidity sensor.
error.ip_required_for_skip_validation: Enter an IP address when using skip validation.
error.network_too_large: The network is too large to scan from setup. Use a /24 network or smaller.
error.no_devices_found: No CozyLife devices were found on the selected network.
error.no_network: Home Assistant could not detect a local IPv4 network. Enter a network CIDR manually.
error.timeout_connect: Timed out while connecting to the device.

abort.already_configured: This CozyLife device is already configured.
